name: Foulborn United in Dream
explicitMods: Minions have 60% chance to Poison Enemies on Hit
mutatedMods: +30% to Quality of all Minion Skill Gems
flavourText: They grow fat and ripe in slumber.
To be fed upon when he wakes.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Desecrates the ground, spawning corpses based on monsters in the current area and dealing chaos damage over time to enemies. If you are using the Raise Spectre skill there is a chance to spawn spectral corpses matching your most recently raised Spectres. Spectral corpses cannot be interacted with except by Minion skills.
explicitMods: Deals 8.2 Base Chaos Damage per second
Spawned corpses' level matches the area level, up to a maximum of Level 20
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports aura skills that affect you and allies, increasing the aura's effect on allies, but preventing it from affecting you at all. Cannot support curse auras, or other auras that only affect enemies. Cannot support skills used by totems. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

Supported Auras do not affect you
Non-Curse Auras from Supported Skills have 39% increased Effect

a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

Maximum number of Summoned Golems is Doubled

How it chokes the heart. Withers the soul. Judge me, and you judge yourself."
- Saresh, last words, to Sekhema Orbala
